data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of capturing failure reasons and linking endpoints, but the evidence provided does not include any details or checks related to failure reasons or their linkage to endpoints. The linked use case explicitly states the need for failure reason capture and endpoint linkage, yet there is no evidence of such functionality being validated or confirmed. This indicates a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of failure reason capture or endpoint linkage.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for failure reason capture
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks to validate failure reasons and their linkage to endpoints.
